ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the player */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the player */,
  "club" TEXT /* Club that the player is currently with */,
  "value_eur" REAL /* Market value of the player in Euros */,
  "wage_eur" REAL /* Current wage of the player in Euros */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the player's data record */,
  "potential" INTEGER /* Potential rating of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (Left/Right) */,
  "international_reputation" INTEGER /* International reputation score of the player */,
  "weak_foot" INTEGER /* Weak foot skill rating */,
  "skill_moves" INTEGER /* Skill moves rating */,
  "team_position" TEXT /* Position on the team */,
  "team_jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the club */,
  "contract_valid_until" TEXT /* Contract validity end date */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the last injury */,
  "injury_recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date from the last injury */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date when the player's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "pace" INTEGER /* Speed rating of the player */,
  "shooting" INTEGER /* Shooting rating of the player */,
  "passing" INTEGER /* Passing rating of the player */,
  "dribbling" INTEGER /* Dribbling rating of the player */,
  "defending" INTEGER /* Defending rating of the player */,
  "physic" INTEGER /* Physical rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "goalkeeping_stats" (
  "gk_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goalkeeper stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who is a goalkeeper */,
  "gk_diving" INTEGER /* Diving rating of the goalkeeper */,
  "gk_handling" INTEGER /* Handling rating of the goalkeeper */,
  "gk_kicking" INTEGER /* Kicking rating of the goalkeeper */,
  "gk_reflexes" INTEGER /* Reflexes rating of the goalkeeper */,
  "gk_speed" INTEGER /* Speed rating of the goalkeeper */,
  "gk_positioning" INTEGER /* Positioning rating of the goalkeeper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gk_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_goalkeeping_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_traits" (
  "trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trait entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "traits" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of player traits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_traits_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "attacking_crossing" INTEGER /* Crossing skill rating */,
  "attacking_finishing" INTEGER /* Finishing skill rating */,
  "attacking_heading_accuracy" INTEGER /* Heading accuracy rating */,
  "attacking_short_passing" INTEGER /* Short passing skill rating */,
  "attacking_volleys" INTEGER /* Volleys skill rating */,
  "skill_dribbling" INTEGER /* Dribbling skill rating */,
  "skill_curve" INTEGER /* Curve skill rating */,
  "skill_fk_accuracy" INTEGER /* Free kick accuracy rating */,
  "skill_long_passing" INTEGER /* Long passing skill rating */,
  "skill_ball_control" INTEGER /* Ball control skill rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_skills_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movement_stats" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "acceleration" INTEGER /* Acceleration rating */,
  "sprint_speed" INTEGER /* Sprint speed rating */,
  "agility" INTEGER /* Agility rating */,
  "reactions" INTEGER /* Reactions rating */,
  "balance" INTEGER /* Balance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movement_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "power_stats" (
  "power_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each power stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "shot_power" INTEGER /* Shot power rating */,
  "jumping" INTEGER /* Jumping rating */,
  "stamina" INTEGER /* Stamina rating */,
  "strength" INTEGER /* Strength rating */,
  "long_shots" INTEGER /* Long shots rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("power_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_power_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentality_stats" (
  "mentality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mentality stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "aggression" INTEGER /* Aggression rating */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Interceptions rating */,
  "positioning" INTEGER /* Positioning rating */,
  "vision" INTEGER /* Vision rating */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Penalty rating */,
  "composure" INTEGER /* Composure rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mentality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentality_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defending_stats" (
  "defending_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defending stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "marking" INTEGER /* Marking rating */,
  "standing_tackle" INTEGER /* Standing tackle rating */,
  "sliding_tackle" INTEGER /* Sliding tackle rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("defending_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defending_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_details" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in months */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date the player’s contract started */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date the player’s contract ends */,
  "contract_value_eur" REAL /* Total value of the contract in Euros */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., 'Active', 'Expired') */,
  "option_clause" TEXT /* Description of any option clauses in the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_details_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_management" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login (hashed) */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., 'Coach', 'Scout', 'Executive') */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., 'Read', 'Write', 'Admin') */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., 'Sprain', 'Fracture') */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_fitness" (
  "fitness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date of the fitness test */,
  "aerobic_capacity" REAL /* Aerobic capacity rating */,
  "anaerobic_capacity" REAL /* Anaerobic capacity rating */,
  "muscle_mass" REAL /* Muscle mass percentage */,
  "body_fat" REAL /* Body fat percentage */,
  "injury_risk" TEXT /* Injury risk level (e.g., 'Low', 'Medium', 'High') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fitness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_fitness_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent team */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Whether the match was home or away */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards */,
  "rating" REAL /* Overall performance rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_matches_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video */,
  "video_description" TEXT /* Description of the video content */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the video was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_videos_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
